name: Suspicious Process Start Locations Detected
description: Detection of processes running from unusual file system locations such as the Recycle Bin or Fonts folder. Adversaries often place malicious executables in these non-standard directories to evade detection, which is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process, **{image}**, was launched from a suspicious file system location. This is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1036**), where an adversary is attempting to hide malicious activity in a non-standard directory. The process was launched with the command line **{command}** under the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The process image that was launched.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
